claim: GetGOgentDir fell back to a shared /tmp/gogent-fallback directory with 0755 permissions, exposing cache and guard state to other local users when XDG and HOME paths were unwritable.
evidence: pkg/config/paths.go:47-64 previously built filepath.Join(os.TempDir(), "gogent-fallback"); pkg/config/paths.go:118-128 and 470-475 place tool-counter, violations, and guard files under that directory; pkg/telemetry/invocations.go:47-85 and pkg/workflow/logging.go:16-54 also write global logs there.
runtimeTrigger: Run GOgent in a sandbox or container with read-only HOME/XDG directories; another local process can inspect or overwrite /tmp/gogent-fallback/{tool-counter,guards,...} and corrupt later runs.

claim: GetGOgentDataDir fell back to a shared /tmp/gogent-data directory with 0755 permissions, so routing and review telemetry from one user could be read or tampered with by another when XDG_DATA_HOME and HOME were unwritable.
evidence: pkg/config/paths.go:323-343 previously built filepath.Join(os.TempDir(), "gogent-data"); pkg/config/paths.go:352-465 routes routing-decision, collaboration, review, and sharp-edge telemetry into that directory; pkg/telemetry/routing_decision.go:90-150 and pkg/telemetry/review_finding.go:58-83 append JSONL records there.
runtimeTrigger: Run telemetry logging on a host where XDG_DATA_HOME and ~/.local/share are unavailable; files like routing-decisions.jsonl and review-findings.jsonl are written under /tmp/gogent-data where another local user can inspect or append records.
